disclosure_items.clinical_fact: About six months of escalating emotional depletion from a demanding people-facing role, culminating in a physical collapse and being bedbound over the last 48 hours
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me what's been happening?
How long have you been feeling like this?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's been building for months — I've felt more and more drained, and over the last two days I just crashed. I can't get out of bed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Passive thoughts of death — sometimes wishes they would not wake up — with no active plan or intent to harm themselves
trigger_question_examples: Sometimes when people feel this exhausted and low, they have thoughts that life isn't worth living — have you had any thoughts like that?
Have you had any thoughts of not wanting to be here, or of harming yourself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: (quietly) Sometimes I just wish I wouldn't wake up. I'm not going to do anything — I just want it all to stop and to rest.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I'm just exhausted, that's all. I wouldn't actually do anything.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has barely been able to eat or drink for two days and has needed help with fluids
trigger_question_examples: Have you been able to eat and drink?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Not really. My partner has been getting me to sip water but I haven't eaten much at all.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Loss of interest and feeling is localised to work — used to feel passionate about it and now feels numb about it, but still cares about their partner and other parts of life
trigger_question_examples: Is there anything you still enjoy or care about outside of work?
Has your interest in other things — people, hobbies — changed too, or mainly work?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel completely numb about work — I used to care so much. But I still love my partner, I just have nothing left to give right now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No previous mental health diagnosis and not taking any psychiatric medication
trigger_question_examples: Have you had anything like this before, or seen anyone for your mental health?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I've never been through anything like this and I'm not on any medication.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Feels intense guilt and an inability to set limits or step back from responsibilities, and feels resentful toward others who can disengage
trigger_question_examples: What happens when you try to take a break?
How do you feel about stepping back from it all?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: If I stop, I feel like everything falls apart and it's my fault. I can't switch off, and I resent that other people just get to walk away.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reports intermittent sensation of a racing heart and feeling tense
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed your heart racing or any chest symptoms?
Any physical symptoms alongside the exhaustion?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My heart feels like it's pounding sometimes and I feel wound up, even lying still.
